gt_sql: SELECT T2.element FROM connected AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR000_2_3'
pred_sql:
SELECT a1.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR000_2_3'
UNION
SELECT a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR000_2_3';
question: Name the atoms' elements that form bond TR000_2_3.
